---
name: Bug report
about: Report reproducible behavior that appears incorrect
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## What happened

Describe the bug and the behavior you expected instead.

## Reproduction

Provide the smallest code snippet, command sequence, or configuration that
reproduces the issue.

## Environment

- Package version:
- Python version:
- Operating system:
- Relevant companion SDK versions, if applicable:

## Logs or output

Paste relevant error messages or logs. Remove secrets, tokens, private paths,
and proprietary data before submitting.

## Additional context

Add any other context that would help maintainers reproduce or triage the issue.
